tests.name: All required files exist
tests.run: test -f index.html && test -f sketch.js && test -f game.js && test -f player.js && test -f enemies.js && test -f bullets.js && test -f collisions.js && test -f ui.js && echo 'PASS: All files found'

tests.name: README has team members listed
tests.run: grep -c 'Member [12]' README.md | awk '{if ($1 >= 2) print "PASS: Team members listed"; else print "FAIL"}'

tests.name: README has game name filled in
tests.run: if grep -q '\[Your Game Name\]' README.md; then echo 'FAIL: Game name not filled in'; else echo 'PASS: Game name customized'; fi

tests.name: player.js has required functions
tests.run: grep -q 'function resetPlayer' player.js && grep -q 'function updatePlayer' player.js && grep -q 'function drawPlayer' player.js && echo 'PASS: Player functions found'

tests.name: player.js has real implementation (not just stubs)
tests.run: LINES=$(grep -v '^\/\/' player.js | grep -v '^$' | grep -v '^ *\/\/' | wc -l); if [ $LINES -gt 30 ]; then echo 'PASS: Player has implementation'; else echo 'FAIL: Player still mostly stubs'; fi

tests.name: enemies.js has required functions
tests.run: grep -q 'function spawnEnemy' enemies.js && grep -q 'function updateEnemies' enemies.js && grep -q 'function drawEnemies' enemies.js && echo 'PASS: Enemy functions found'

tests.name: enemies.js has real implementation
tests.run: LINES=$(grep -v '^\/\/' enemies.js | grep -v '^$' | grep -v '^ *\/\/' | wc -l); if [ $LINES -gt 30 ]; then echo 'PASS: Enemies has implementation'; else echo 'FAIL: Enemies still mostly stubs'; fi

tests.name: collisions.js has collision checking
tests.run: grep -q 'function checkAllCollisions' collisions.js && grep -q 'dist(' collisions.js && echo 'PASS: Collision detection implemented'

tests.name: ui.js has all three screens
tests.run: grep -q 'function drawMenu' ui.js && grep -q 'function drawHUD' ui.js && grep -q 'function drawGameOver' ui.js && echo 'PASS: All UI screens found'

tests.name: Game uses arrays (push or splice)
tests.run: PUSH=$(grep -rl '\.push(' player.js enemies.js bullets.js collisions.js | wc -l); SPLICE=$(grep -rl '\.splice(' player.js enemies.js bullets.js collisions.js | wc -l); if [ $((PUSH + SPLICE)) -ge 2 ]; then echo 'PASS: Arrays used with push/splice'; else echo 'FAIL: Not enough array operations'; fi

tests.name: Multiple team members contributed (git log)
tests.run: AUTHORS=$(git log --format='%an' | sort -u | wc -l); if [ $AUTHORS -ge 2 ]; then echo 'PASS: Multiple contributors'; else echo 'FAIL: Only one contributor found'; fi
